data.title: Bitcoin Hash Rate Recovery Signals Potential Gains
data.description: Bitcoin's hash rate has shown signs of recovery, which, coupled with negative funding rates, may indicate potential gains for the cryptocurrency, according to the ETF provider's latest network analysis. The analysis suggests that these factors could contribute to a favorable environment for Bitcoin's price movement, highlighting the importance of monitoring network metrics in assessing future market trends.

data.title: World Bank Forecasts Energy Price Surge Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description:
The World Bank, in its latest Commodity Markets Outlook released on Tuesday, projected a significant rise in energy prices by 24% in 2026, assuming the most severe disruptions from the Middle East conflict end by May. According to Jin10, this would mark the highest level since the Russia-Ukraine conflict four years ago. The World Bank warned that if hostilities in the region escalate and supply disruptions persist longer than expected, commodity prices could rise further. The bank's baseline scenario assumes that shipping through the Strait of Hormuz will gradually return to near pre-conflict levels by October, although risks are "clearly tilted" towards higher prices.

The World Bank's baseline forecast indicates an overall 16% increase in commodity prices in 2026, driven by soaring energy and fertilizer prices and record highs in several major metal prices. The report highlighted that attacks on energy infrastructure and disruptions in strait shipping have triggered the largest oil supply shock on record. The bank expects the average price of Brent crude oil to reach $86 per barrel in 2026, a significant increase from $69 per barrel in 2025. The report also noted that if key oil and gas facilities suffer further war damage and export recovery is slow, the average Brent crude price could reach as high as $115 per barrel this year.

data.title: Microsoft CEO and OpenAI Founder Resolve Dispute Over AWS Deal
data.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella and OpenAI founder Sam Altman have reached a compromise following disagreements over OpenAI's deal with Amazon Web Services (AWS). According to Jin10, the negotiations between the two leaders have led to a resolution, smoothing tensions related to the collaboration with AWS. This development comes amid ongoing discussions about the strategic partnerships and technological advancements involving major tech companies.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI's User Acquisition Challenges Impact Data-Center Bonds
data.description: US corporate bonds associated with data-center companies experienced a decline on Tuesday. Bloomberg posted on X that this downturn followed a report revealing OpenAI's recent struggles to achieve its targets for new user acquisition and sales, leading to internal apprehensions. The report has raised concerns about the potential impact on data-center firms that support AI operations.

data.title: OpenAI Misses Revenue and User Targets Amid AI Earnings Season
data.description: OpenAI has reportedly failed to meet its internal revenue and user targets, according to a new report from the Wall Street Journal. This development comes as the AI earnings season begins, potentially impacting investor sentiment and market performance. The shortfall in targets could raise questions about OpenAI's growth trajectory and its ability to capitalize on the burgeoning AI market, according to BeInCrypto. The timing of this news may influence market perceptions as companies in the AI sector prepare to release their earnings.

data.title: Trump: Iran wants us to open the Strait of Hormuz
data.description: US President Trump: Iran just informed us that they are in a state of "collapse." They want us to "open the Strait of Hormuz" as soon as possible because they are working on a leadership issue (I believe they can do it!).

data.title: Iranian Revolutionary Guard: Has Achieved Absolute Control over the Strait of Hormuz
data.description: On the 28th local time, the deputy commander of the Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy stated that Iran has achieved absolute control over the Strait of Hormuz and is demanding passage fees from ships. He emphasized that Iran's territorial sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz is inviolable, and foreign vessels must abide by Iranian rules when passing through the waterway, including using Persian for communication. He stated, "Without the orders of the Supreme Leader and the will of the people, Iran will not allow even a single liter of oil to flow out of the strait." He also stated that the Iranian military is currently "on high alert." He claimed that the US military's hegemony in the Persian Gulf has ended and reiterated Iran's capability to cope with any form of maritime blockade. (CCTV News)

data.title: Gold and silver prices plunged while crude oil prices surged, causing significant volatility in global commodities.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fell to $4,577.52 per ounce, a daily drop of 2.22%. Silver prices fell to $72.547 per ounce, a daily drop of 3.87%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 42.06, a daily increase of 0.84%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 60.30, a daily increase of 0.50%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.21% to 6.83986. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.07% to 159.546. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 2.96% to $102.40 per barrel. Brent crude oil rose 2.30% to $110.68 per barrel. Gate allows users to trade traditional financial market products directly within the platform, providing a one-stop solution for various asset classes including precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration between crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi functionality is fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to conveniently participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities beyond the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Coinbase launches Pharos (PROS) spot trading
data.description: According to an official announcement from Coinbase Markets, spot trading of Pharos (PROS) officially launched on Coinbase on April 28, 2026. The PROS-USD trading pair will be gradually opened in supported trading regions on the same day, subject to liquidity requirements being met.

data.title: Crypto stocks generally retreated at the open, with Strategy (MSTR) falling more than 3%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.21%, the S&P 500 fell 0.51%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 1.07%. Most crypto stocks weakened, with Strategy (MSTR) down 3.36%, Coinbase down 2.89%, Bitmine down 2.51%, Circle down 1.61%, and SharpLink down 1.39%; while Solana bucked the trend, rising 1.42%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: OKX will launch PROSUSDT perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to official news, Easun will officially launch PROSUSDT perpetual contracts on its website, app, and API at 22:00 (UTC+8) on April 28, 2026. PROSUSDT contract trading opening time: April 28, 2026, 22:00 (UTC+8)

data.title: Tether Unveils Advanced Modular Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure
data.description:
Tether has announced the launch of a new generation of modular Bitcoin mining infrastructure aimed at enhancing energy efficiency, cost control, and scalability through a self-developed high-density computing system. According to Foresight News, this solution is built on application-specific hash board modules and developed in collaboration with Canaan Inc. and ACME Swisstech. The design decouples computing, power supply, and chassis structure, allowing for component-level optimization and flexible upgrades. Unlike traditional integrated mining machines, this design supports on-demand expansion and component replacement, improving thermal management efficiency.

Tether stated that the new system can integrate immersion cooling to reduce energy consumption and operational costs while increasing system availability. The architecture also allows for dynamic performance adjustments in real-world environments to meet varying mining site demands. This upgrade builds on Tether's previous open-source Mining OS (MOS) and Mining SDK developments, marking a significant step from software control to hardware design, thereby strengthening its autonomous control over mining infrastructure.

data.title: Cathie Wood Revises Bitcoin's Role in Global Payments
data.description: Cathie Wood, CEO of Ark Invest, has acknowledged that stablecoins have taken on some of the payment functions she initially anticipated Bitcoin would fulfill. According to NS3.AI, Wood's original thesis envisioned Bitcoin as a cornerstone of global payment and monetary infrastructure. However, the rise of stablecoins has led her to adjust this perspective, recognizing their growing influence in the financial ecosystem.

data.title: Toku Integrates Paxos's Amplify DeFi Feature for Token-Based Salaries
data.description: Toku has integrated Paxos's Amplify DeFi feature, enhancing its token-based salary processing capabilities. According to NS3.AI, Toku processes over $1 billion in token-based salaries annually. The Amplify DeFi feature allows users to receive their salaries in stablecoins and automatically earn interest without transferring funds to a separate DeFi service. Additionally, Toku offers payroll APIs compatible with platforms like ADP, UKG, and Workday, serving clients in over 100 countries.

data.title: Hungary's Central Bank Governor Varga: Inflation Risks Rise Due to Fertilizer Price Increase
data.description: Hungary's Central Bank Governor Varga has highlighted concerns over rising inflation risks, attributing the increase to higher fertilizer prices. According to Jin10, Varga emphasized that the surge in fertilizer costs is contributing to upward pressure on inflation, which could have broader economic implications. The central bank is closely monitoring the situation to assess potential impacts on monetary policy and economic stability.

data.title: NUVA Digital Secures $5.2 Million in Seed Funding Led by Morgan Creek Digital
data.description:
NUVA Digital, a software development company for the RWA trading platform NUVA, has successfully raised $5.2 million in a seed funding round led by Morgan Creek Digital. According to Foresight News, NUVA is a collaborative creation by Animoca Brands and Nuva Labs. The platform enables users to deposit stablecoins with a single click, mint yield-bearing composable tokens, and provides on-chain proof of reserves without any minimum deposit or lock-up requirements.

The newly acquired funds will be utilized to accelerate platform development and expand the ecosystem. This includes enhancing the treasury market, introducing more issuers, deploying across multiple chains, building institutional-grade tools, and advancing the issuance of NUVA's functional tokens.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls Below 76,000 USDT with 2.28% Decline
data.description: Bitcoin has experienced a drop below 76,000 USDT, according to Odaily. The current price stands at 75,992.6 USDT, marking a 2.28% decrease over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Tether is developing a new Bitcoin mining infrastructure that uses a modular computing system to control costs and efficiency.
data.description: According to official sources, Tether is expanding its custom computing infrastructure with a new type of modular, high-density mining system aimed at improving the efficiency and performance of large-scale operations. Tether is collaborating with Canaan Inc. and ACME Swisstech to build the system around application-specific hash board modules and integrate them into its proprietary control architecture, thermal management system, and software stack. This system allows for independent optimization of each component by separating computing from power and enclosure, and reduces energy consumption when combined with immersion cooling technology. Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino stated that this move aims to change the current state of sealed, fixed mining equipment by deploying modular computing units that can be independently tuned, upgraded, and cooled, directly controlling the cost and efficiency of large-scale operations. Canaan Inc. Chairman and CEO Zhang Nangeng stated that its Avalon hash board modules enable more flexible, on-demand deployment, especially improving efficiency and reducing operational complexity in immersion cooling systems. This deployment builds upon Tether's previously developed open-source mining operating system (MOS) and mining software development kit (SDK).

data.title: CFTC Develops AI Tools for U.S. Crypto Market Oversight
data.description:
The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is advancing its use of artificial intelligence to enhance the review of registration applications and monitor trading in the U.S. crypto market. According to Odaily, CFTC Chairman Mike Selig highlighted the agency's efforts in an interview with CoinDesk, noting that AI and automation are being leveraged to address staffing reductions exceeding 20% due to federal government layoffs. Employees are currently being trained on Microsoft Copilot, and the CFTC is developing internal tools for swap data review and market surveillance.

Selig also emphasized the significance of the joint digital asset classification guidelines released with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), which aim to provide regulatory clarity for market participants. In the realm of prediction markets, Selig reaffirmed the CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction and stressed the agency's commitment to enforcing actions against violations such as insider trading.

data.title: Polymarket Completes Upgrade of Decentralized Prediction Market Platform
data.description: Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market platform, has successfully completed the upgrade of its spot order book CLOB v2, with trading functions gradually resuming. According to ChainCatcher, the platform experienced a brief downtime during the upgrade, which led to a temporary suspension of trading and clearing of the order book. However, user funds and positions remained secure throughout the process. Following the launch of the new version, Polymarket initiated a liquidity reward program totaling $1 million, distributing $500,000 in the first two hours and the remaining $500,000 throughout the rest of the day.
